resposta:
solution: 
```python
class Solution:
    def reverseWords(self, s: str) -> str:
        words = s.split()
        return " ".join(words[::-1])
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The solution splits the input string into words, reverses the order of the words, and then joins them back together with a single space. This approach is efficient as it has a linear time complexity and uses space proportional to the number of words in the input string.
